ai_summary: Jagsonpal Pharmaceuticals Ltd. is acquiring an 85% stake in Aequitas Healthcare Private Limited for INR 20.8 Crores cash, strategically entering the hospital and institutional healthcare segment to diversify its business model from a legacy retail player to an omnichannel provider. This acquisition, expected to close by July 15, 2026, grants Jagsonpal immediate access to established hospital networks for its products, funded by internal accruals. While presenting a significant expansion opportunity, Aequitas's revenue has shown a slight decline over the past three years, a minor point to monitor post-acquisition.
